taxonomy: Talguenea quinquenervia is classified within the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family, which consists of flowering plants often found in tropical and subtropical regions. This classification places Talguenea quinquenervia alongside other plants such as citrus fruits and their relatives. The Rutaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Apioideae, which is a subfamily that includes many species of the genus Apium. Talguenea quinquenervia is a relatively understudied plant and its exact classification may be subject to revision as new research emerges. Further study is necessary to confirm the precise classification of this plant within the Rutaceae family.
